headline: How Duke Energy’s Gas Portfolio Shuffle At Duke Energy (DUK) Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Duke Energy recently received approval from the Public Service Commission of South Carolina to build an approximately 1,365 MW high-efficiency natural gas plant in Anderson County, while also completing the US$2.48 billion sale of its Tennessee Piedmont Natural Gas distribution business to Spire. Together, these moves show Duke Energy reshaping its gas portfolio by exiting a non-core distribution market while committing fresh capital to regulated generation that underpins regional growth...

headline: How The Duke Energy (DUK) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Growth Hopes And Valuation Limits
summary: Duke Energy’s latest analyst update centers on an unchanged model fair value of $138.29 and an updated consensus target around $139, keeping the stock’s implied value closely aligned with prior work. That tight range reflects research where some firms have lifted targets while others have cut by $1 to $11 and, in several cases, shifted to more neutral ratings as they weigh strong growth themes against the roughly 15% share move since early December. As you read on, you will see how to track...
